# Hi there, this is Forgemind 👋

Forgemind builds automation and communication tooling for education and training. We connect workflow automation, messaging APIs, and data pipelines so that reaching, teaching, and tracking learners happens reliably and at scale — with full control over our own data and deployments.

- 🤖 We build **automated communication workflows** that keep students engaged across the tools they already use.
- ⚙️ We run on **[n8n](https://n8n.io)** for workflow automation — routing, scheduling, and orchestrating everything end to end.
- 💬 We work deeply with the **WhatsApp Business API** for templated, per-recipient student messaging and engagement tracking.
- 📊 We maintain **data pipelines** that turn raw signals into insight we can act on.

## What we're working on

- **Student messaging at scale** — templated WhatsApp campaigns with per-recipient engagement tracking, so we know what actually lands.
- **Workflow automation** — n8n flows that filter, route, and schedule data without manual glue work.
- **Data & ad tooling** — pipelines that pull, verify, and reconcile data across platforms.

## Get in touch
